_comment: Copy this to site.config.json and fill in client data. Never commit site.config.json.
meta_description_default: RightWay Pest Control serves Jacksonville FL and surrounding areas. Licensed pest control — call for a same-day estimate.
hero_subheadline: Licensed, same-day service across Jacksonville and surrounding counties. Call before noon — we're there today.
about_short: RightWay Pest Control was founded in 2012 by Mike Johnson after 10 years working for national pest control chains. The goal was simple: build a local company that actually shows up on time and treats the problem right the first time.

hubs.name: Termite Control
hubs.description: Comprehensive termite inspection, treatment, and prevention services in Jacksonville and NE Florida.

services.name: General Pest Control
services.description: Monthly and quarterly treatment plans for ants, roaches, spiders, and more.

services.name: Termite Inspection
services.description: WDO inspection reports accepted by lenders and real estate closings.

services.name: Termite Treatment
services.description: Liquid barrier and bait station termite treatment with transferable warranty.

services.name: Mosquito Control
services.description: Seasonal barrier spray programs for backyard mosquito reduction.

services.name: Rodent Exclusion
services.description: Seal entry points and remove existing infestations — no poison traps near pets.

services.name: Bed Bug Treatment
services.description: Heat treatment and chemical options with follow-up inspection.

differentiators.title: Same-Day Service
differentiators.description: Call before noon and we're there today. No 3-day windows, no excuses.

differentiators.title: Licensed & Insured
differentiators.description: FL PCO license PCO-FL-12345, fully bonded. All technicians are state-certified.

differentiators.title: 30-Day Satisfaction Guarantee
differentiators.description: If pests return within 30 days of treatment, we re-treat at no charge.

process_steps.title: Call or Book Online
process_steps.description: Reach us by phone, text, or our online form. No automated systems — a real person picks up.

process_steps.title: Free Inspection
process_steps.description: A licensed technician visits your property, identifies the problem, and walks you through the options.

process_steps.title: Same-Day Treatment
process_steps.description: We treat immediately in most cases — no waiting a week for a second appointment.

process_steps.title: Guaranteed Follow-Up
process_steps.description: We schedule a check-in and re-treat free if the problem persists within 30 days.

testimonials.name: Sarah R.
testimonials.quote: Called at 9am about a roach problem and they were at my house by noon. The technician was thorough and explained everything. Haven't seen a roach since.

testimonials.name: Tom K.
testimonials.quote: Best pest control company I've used in 15 years of homeownership. They actually show up when they say they will.

testimonials.name: Angela M.
testimonials.quote: Mike's team handled our termite situation quickly and the price was fair. The warranty gives me real peace of mind.
